title: ParCool Sprint Fix
description: A tiny client-side compatibility fix for ParCool.
body:
![parcool sprint fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/badc7862fbcea18816b11553bff3287b66f357ed.png)

A tiny Forge 1.20.1 helper that disables ParCool's oldSprinting restore cache.

ParCool Sprint Fix is a tiny client-side compatibility helper for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1. It has one job: when ParCool is installed, it clears ParCool's injected `oldSprinting` cache on the local player so ParCool cannot restore sprint state unexpectedly. ## Authors - Author: `Szo9K4` ## Credits - ParCool, for the original movement system this helper is designed to patch around. - Other players who helped test and report sprint-related compatibility issues. ## License - Code: All Rights Reserved. See `LICENSE`.
